# Security Policy ## Supported Versions Use this section to tell people about which versions of your project are currently being supported with security updates. | Version | Supported | | ------- | ------------------ | | 1.x | :white_check_mark: | | < 1.0 | :x: | ## Reporting a Vulnerability Please report all vulnerabilities at [https://github.com/mcollina/fastq/security](https://github.com/mcollina/fastq/security).
